creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey!

What packages are you using?

When I try each of your examples I have the expected outcome, this is using pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/${ABI}/latest:

romain@zappy ~ % ls -l /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/puppet.rb
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  13665 12 juil. 06:22 /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/puppet.rb
romain@zappy ~ % pkg info -l puppet7 | grep '2.7/puppet.rb'
	/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/puppet.rb

And I can add:

romain@zappy ~ % pkg which /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/puppet.rb
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/puppet.rb was installed by package puppet7-7.9.0

So the FreeBSD packages seems to be fine, I am curious about the configuration of your repo?
